final:
module eth_mac_controller (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire reset,  
    input wire enable,  
    input wire [7:0] data_in,  
    output reg [7:0] data_out  
);  

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    begin end  // redundant  
        if (reset) begin  
            data_out <= 8'b0;  
        end else if (enable) begin  
            data_out <= data_in + 1;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
